text.title: Progressive Disclosure Skills Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every progressive-disclosure-skills spec MUST enforce.

rule.statement: Every skill's frontmatter MUST stay under 150 tokens (name+description+triggers).
rule.rationale: Frontmatter is always-loaded; bloat there compounds across all skills.

rule.statement: Skill body MUST be loadable only when frontmatter triggers fire; never always-on.
rule.rationale: Always-on bodies defeat the disclosure principle.

rule.statement: Long content (>300 tokens) MUST live under references/ or .agents/ loaded via explicit Read.
rule.rationale: Defers cost; reader pays only when needed.

rule.statement: Triggers MUST be precise keywords/phrases, NOT broad terms like 'help' or 'do something'.
rule.rationale: Broad triggers fire on every prompt; defeats disclosure.

rule.statement: Skills MUST be 3 levels (frontmatter/body/references). No 4+-level nesting.
rule.rationale: Deeper nesting confuses agents and humans.
